ocr_findings.description: TOC entry for 'TOC' term has reading aid 'ティオーシー' (visible as small furigana-style ruby above the cell in image) rendered as 'ナノアート' in OCR — a spurious kanji/katakana substitution in the ruby position. The term 'TOC' itself is correctly captured.
'試験にはコレが出る！' rendered as '試験にはつしが出る！' — consistent icon-misread pattern.
'学習のポイント' sidebar label on mascot callout box (ERPとSCM section) not captured — decorative label only.

reviewer_notes: 事業戦略と経営管理システム page with ERP/SCM distinction callout, その他の関連用語 table (ナレッジマネジメント, TOC). All key definitions are reproduced correctly. The 'ナノアート' artifact in the TOC ruby position is a low-severity wrong_char. No high- or med-severity issues.
